$comment: THE CONTRACT between the R half (src/phenotype) and the Python half (src/aou_ascvd). D-005.
Validated on WRITE (R) and on READ (Python). A violation RAISES — never a warning, never a
coerced value, never a silently-dropped row. The whole point is to turn silent corruption into
a loud stop. Specification and rationale: VALIDATION.md §3.
v1 describes what the EXISTING notebook ETL actually produces (see fixture/expected/answer_key.csv).
It is deliberately NOT the set of columns the study needs: PREVENT requires total cholesterol,
HDL-C, systolic BP, antihypertensive use, diabetes, smoking, and eGFR, and the current pipeline
extracts NONE of them. That gap is the single largest implementation task in the project (T-003,
D-004), and it is recorded here rather than hidden — see 'required_for_prevent_not_yet_extracted'.
table_level_checks: column set matches this schema exactly - no extra, no missing
row count equals the cohort count from the attrition table
date_of_birth precedes every event date in the same row

person_id.$comment: Fixture defect A5 seeds a NULL person_id, and A4 a duplicated person row that multiplies rows across the entire join (participant 1000026). Both are real; both must fail validation here rather than downstream.

date_of_birth.description: From demo_df; the left-most table in the join.
date_of_birth.$comment: Fixture defect A3 (participant 1000023) has a DOB AFTER the events, producing negative ages. The non-negative-age check is not hypothetical.

race.description: Self-reported. NOT a substitute for genetic ancestry.
race.$comment: PREVENT is deliberately race-free (D-004). This column exists for reporting and for stratified validation (T-007), NOT as a model input. Genetic ancestry PCs are a separate thing and must not be conflated with this.

sex_at_birth.description: PREVENT has sex-specific coefficient sets, so this is required, not optional.

LDL.description: Earliest LDL-C. Unit and bounds from configs/config.yaml.
LDL.$comment: A-004: the notebook additionally caps this at <400, which would delete untreated FH carriers - exactly the people this study is designed to find. The cap is NOT applied here. A-001: 'earliest' is probably the wrong anchor for a prediction study.

LDL_measured_on_meds.description: Was the LDL draw after any_chol_med_start_date?
LDL_measured_on_meds.$comment: KNOWN DEFECT, not yet fixed: this is contaminated by the any_chol_med bug below. A survey non-user gets any_chol_med=1 and a start date, which flips this from NA to 1. Fixture participant 1000014. T-005.

CAD_code.$comment: A-006: 0 means 'no code found', NOT 'confirmed disease-free'. This is non-random outcome misclassification and it tracks healthcare access (Q-A2).

CAD_code_date.$comment: Earliest CAD event: ICD conditions and CPT procedures unioned, then re-reduced to earliest per person.

any_chol_med.description: Statin, non-statin lipid-lowering drug, or self-reported use.
any_chol_med.$comment: KNOWN DEFECT (fixture finding 1, participant 1000014): meds_df contains everyone who ANSWERED the statin survey, including those who answered 'No'. The collapse `any_chol_med[!is.na(...)] <- 1` treats the string 'no' as present-and-therefore-yes, so NON-USERS ARE SCORED AS USERS. It cascades into LDL_measured_on_meds. The fixture asserts the BUGGY behaviour on purpose so it cannot be fixed by accident or reintroduced silently. Fix in T-005; this comment comes out when the assertion flips.

censor_type.description: 1 = no CAD code; 2 = CAD code precedes first visit; 3 = CAD code after first visit.
censor_type.$comment: From the notebook's IN PROGRESS `# Get censored ages` section. Type 2 is the prevalent-disease case and is exactly the group PREVENT is undefined for (DESIGN §2) - which is why this section is load-bearing, not scratch work. Fixture participant 1000024 has a CAD code and ZERO visits, which breaks censoring outright (defect A6).

$comment: PREVENT's inputs (D-004). The current ETL extracts only BMI, age, and sex from this list.
Listed here so the gap is visible in the contract itself rather than discovered at T-006.
Adding each of these is T-003; each needs fixture coverage (T-004) before it can be trusted.

egfr.$comment: Requires serum creatinine plus the CKD-EPI 2021 (race-free) equation.

statin_use.status: PARTIAL - see the any_chol_med defect above
